SMI". God is
Omnipotent, and Omnivariant. By his TEJAS- the Glow of the
Almighty the entire process of the universe flows. This is carried
on through the nature and the creatures appearing in various
forms of bodies- both physical and meta-physical. The/Hindu
concept is that of SHIV A AND SHAKTHI or
ARDHANARISWARA TATWA- the concept of Androgynous.
2. All the creatures of the world contain the Spirit of God
in the form of Glow (the Tejas) and every individual creature is
designed to function independently and act according to the Tejas
in him. The science of Astrology follows the very same principles
ofVISHWA TATWA. The entire nature is broadly classified as
PRAKRUTHI AND PURUSHA- as ordained by the Almighty-
and every act ofthe Universe and the creatures follows the two
tatwas.
3. How do PLANETS EFFECT THE ACTIONS OF
HUMAN BEINGS AND ALL THE CREATURES?
The whole world may be likened to a vehicle. Petrol is
required to run the Vehicle. But if the Carburetor becomes rich
